Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9000 "TOMBSOFXEIOPS-9000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tombs of Xeiops.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $9000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
